title: AVATARS — Pokédex grid
subtitle: Two-column grid of identical card components. The active card is differentiated by ONE visual signal: a cyan border.

regions.label: PAGE HEADER
regions.note: Centered alignment. Different from lesson pages on purpose: signals 'hub, not step in a flow.'

regions.label: ACTIVE CARD
regions.note: Same card template as Inu; signaled active by a single cyan outline + glow. ONE attribute.

regions.label: ROSTER CARD
regions.note: Identical structure: portrait, name, role, flavor, tag pills. Repetition = peers.
